data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for compensation for bumped customers.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of providing compensation for bumped customers, as stated in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the implementation or existence of such compensation mechanisms in the current system. The prior steps do not demonstrate any functionality related to compensating bumped customers, leading to the conclusion that the validation is inconclusive.
gaps: Compensation for bumped customers is not implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
